testcase.name: Status is 201

failure.message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9efb6eb4-c212-4aa6-b865-c8ff3d31fd6d. Collection name: Food Rescue API Integration. Request name: Auth / Register Donor - Success.
